question: Can we interpret the DoD "login succeeds" as requiring E2E tests?

options.label: Require E2E tests
options.consequence: Implementation takes longer but the acceptance criteria become clear

options.label: Unit tests alone are sufficient
options.consequence: Finishes faster but leaves a UI regression risk

options.label: A hybrid of unit tests plus smoke E2E

impact: Affects the test strategy and the completion criteria
diff_summary: The added scope of tests/auth/ and tests/e2e/ changes
